per_turn_leaks.student_message: Hi, I'm here to help you. What's been going on?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've been having this awful stomach pain that just won't go away. It started about 3 weeks ago and it's been getting worse - now I'm experiencing bloody stools too, which is really freaking me out.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: That sounds really uncomfortable. I can tell this has been weighing on you.
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, it's been keeping me up at night, to be honest. The pain is crampy and mostly on my left side, but it feels like it's radiating everywhere. And the bloody stools are just...I don't know, it's terrifying. I've tried taking some Imodium for the diarrhea, but that's not helping much anymore.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I want to make sure we don't miss anything important. When these episodes happen, does your body react in any other way?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: To be honest, I've been feeling pretty fatigued lately, and my knees and ankles have been aching - it's like my whole body is just exhausted all the time. And sometimes I get this low-grade fever that just goes away on its own...but yeah, it's all connected to this gut stuff, I'm sure of it.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: It must be frightening when symptoms like these happen. Any other areas of your body affected?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: It's just my abdomen and joints, really. The joint pain has been bothering me for a while now, but it seems to get worse when I'm having an episode with the stomach pain. And, uh, I guess I should mention that I've also been drinking more beer lately to try and calm down - stress from work and all this going on has been really getting to me.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you had any fevers or night sweats? I know it might seem unrelated, but it helps me understand the full picture.
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, like I mentioned before, I've gotten these low-grade fevers a few times a week. They're not super high, just around 98 to 99 degrees Fahrenheit, and they usually go away on their own within a day or two. But it's been going on for a while now, so that's something I'm worried about too... (looks concerned) Do you think that could be related to what's going on with my stomach?
